overall.description: A first-person perspective from Cyberpunk 2077 shows a foggy nighttime view of Night City from a hillside vantage point. The player pans across the neon-lit skyline visible through heavy atmospheric haze, with UI elements indicating the 'Red Peaks' area and mission boundaries.

events.description: UI notification 'RED PEAKS' appears in the lower left corner indicating the area name

agents.ego_description: standing on a hillside overlooking the city, slowly panning the camera to survey the landscape

entered.detail: fog-obscured skyline of Night City with scattered illuminated windows and neon signs
pink and red neon advertisements glowing through the fog
dark rocky slope in the immediate foreground
game interface text displaying the location name

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy nighttime vista of a distant cyberpunk city from a hillside perch. The camera slowly pans left while the player observes the neon-lit skyline through heavy atmospheric haze. A UI element appears identifying the location as 'Red Peaks'.

events.description: brighter neon signs on the right side of the city become visible as the camera pans

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left across the cityscape, revealing different districts of the skyline

entered.detail: cluster of high-rise buildings with illuminated windows on the right side of the city

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning left across the foggy cityscape, causing the skyline to shift toward the right side of the frame. Different sections of the city become visible, including a dense cluster of tall glass buildings with bright illumination, while the 'Red Peaks' UI fades from view.

events.description: city skyline exits the frame, leaving only empty hillside and fog
red warning UI appears indicating the player is leaving the mission area
camera begins panning back right toward the city

agents.ego_description: panning past the city view into empty terrain, triggering a boundary warning, then turning back toward the city

entered.detail: red game interface banner reading 'TURN BACK! YOU ARE LEAVING THE MISSION AREA'
dark foggy sky visible as the city leaves the frame

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left past the city until only empty hillside and fog remain. A red warning UI appears indicating the mission boundary has been reached. The player then pans back right, bringing the distant city skyline back into view from the hillside overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a foggy nighttime vista that shifts from a neon-lit urban skyline to an empty hillside before returning to the city. It begins with a slow leftward sweep across the distant cyberpunk cityscape, where the bright lights of the skyline are partially obscured by heavy atmospheric haze and a UI element identifies the location as Red Peaks. As the camera continues its movement, the city shifts toward the right of the frame to reveal a dense cluster of illuminated glass skyscrapers while the location marker fades away. The scene then expands past the urban center until only the dark, foggy hillside remains visible, triggering a red warning UI that indicates the mission boundary. Finally, the camera pans back to the right, bringing the glowing city skyline once again into view from the hillside overlook.
